items.name: Banjo
items.description:
I want to be a rock star, and travel really far, and buy / me a big expensive car. /
And make lots of money and find me a honey. /
And live in nice big house where it's sunny. /
With a pool and I'll be cool. /
I'll always have a gig cause I'll be big. /
I'll have parties and friends and places to go, /
The only problem is I play the banjo. - Ryan Shupe

items.name: Cupid's Beloved Blade
items.description: In addition to dealing five points of damage per strike, this blade turns your opponent into a lovely shade of pink! Double tap "W" for a spin attack, double click for a homing attack, or press "A", "W", then "D" for a "pinksplosion"! Each special attack does 10 hit points of damage.
